summary: Tested session persistence feature implementation: localStorage token storage, /auth/me Bearer token support, and auto-redirect for authenticated users. All 7 backend tests passed and all 5 frontend flows verified successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext correctly stores session_token in localStorage with key 'remy_session_token'
checkAuth() properly sends Bearer token header to /auth/me for session validation
Backend /auth/me endpoint correctly accepts both cookie and Authorization header Bearer token
Landing.js and AuthPage.js correctly redirect authenticated users to /dashboard using useEffect
Login and register endpoints return session_token in response for localStorage storage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session persistence is fully implemented and tested. Token storage uses localStorage with key 'remy_session_token'. Backend accepts Bearer token in Authorization header. Auto-redirects work for both Landing (/) and Auth (/auth) pages.

1_session_token_in_localstorage.details: After login, session_token is stored in localStorage with key 'remy_session_token'

2_auth_me_accepts_bearer_token.details: GET /api/auth/me works with Authorization: Bearer <token> header

3_landing_redirects_authenticated.details: Landing page (/) redirects authenticated users to /dashboard

4_auth_redirects_authenticated.details: Auth page (/auth) redirects authenticated users to /dashboard

5_login_redirects_to_dashboard.details: After successful login, user is redirected to /dashboard

6_session_persists_on_reload.details: After page reload, session persists and user stays on /dashboard
